channel.title: Milk Steaming on Barista At Home
channel.description: Recent content in Milk Steaming on Barista At Home

item.title: How to Steam Milk for Espresso Drinks: A Beginner's Guide to Microfoam
item.description: Master milk steaming for lattes, cappuccinos, and flat whites. Step-by-step technique, temperature guide (140–155°F), milk types compared, and the mistakes that trip up every beginner.

item.title: How to Do Latte Art: Beginner's Guide to Free Pour Technique
item.description: Learn how to make latte art at home step by step. Covers the equipment you need, milk steaming technique, basic heart and tulip patterns, and practice tips for beginners.
